title: Vandenboschia × amabilis
taxonomy: Vandenboschia × amabilis is a hybrid species of the genus Vandenboschia. It is a type of fern, specifically a member of the family Dryopteridaceae. Vandenboschia × amabilis is known to be a natural hybrid between Vandenboschia radicans and Vandenboschia amabilis. The exact classification of Vandenboschia × amabilis can be considered as Vandenboschia radicans var. amabilis, however, it is also recognized as a distinct hybrid species in some classifications. The classification of this plant may vary depending on the source and the specific characteristics used for identification.
